name: Zivo Travel Bridge

zivosmediaIntegration.description: Zivos Media remains the all-in-one platform and can show Zivo Travel through shared routes, handoff links, or API-backed cards while this repo owns the dedicated travel product.

cloudflare.recommendedRouting: Route zivostravel.com to the travel surface and keep zivosmedia.com/zivo-travel available as the platform preview.

guardrails: Keep auth, checkout, wallet, payout, and live bookings on the Zivos Media authority until reviewed cutover.
Do not duplicate live booking or payment rows into the travel Supabase project without backups and rollback.
Use the travel Supabase project for telemetry, config, preview data, and staged migrations first.
Only enable the dedicated backend flag after schema, RLS, Edge Functions, provider secrets, and sandbox smoke tests pass.
